creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat May 17 10:55:09 2014
New Revision: 354312
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354312
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354312/

Log:
  - Update to 2.2.0
  
  PR:		189184
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/databases/pecl-memcached/Makefile
  head/databases/pecl-memcached/distinfo
  head/databases/pecl-memcached/pkg-descr

Modified: head/databases/pecl-memcached/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pecl-memcached/Makefile	Sat May 17 10:54:41 2014	(r354311)
+++ head/databases/pecl-memcached/Makefile	Sat May 17 10:55:09 2014	(r354312)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	memcached
-PORTVERSION=	2.1.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-
@@ -14,7 +14,8 @@ COMMENT=	PHP extension for interfacing w
 
 LICENSE=	PHP30
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/pear:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/pear:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear \
+		pkg-config:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pkgconf
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libmemcached.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/libmemcached
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/pear:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear
 
@@ -23,7 +24,8 @@ USE_PHP=	json session
 USE_PHPEXT=	yes
 USE_PHPIZE=	yes
 USE_PHP_BUILD=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-libmemcached-dir=${LOCALBASE}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-libmemcached-dir=${LOCALBASE} \
+		--disable-memcached-sasl
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	IGBINARY
 IGBINARY_DESC=	Binary serializer support

Modified: head/databases/pecl-memcached/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pecl-memcached/distinfo	Sat May 17 10:54:41 2014	(r354311)
+++ head/databases/pecl-memcached/distinfo	Sat May 17 10:55:09 2014	(r354312)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (PECL/memcached-2.1.0.tgz) = bc4940015be74f47908d410d7b55e10a3d5bf65674036d944c73558227fcc4af
-SIZE (PECL/memcached-2.1.0.tgz) = 39095
+SHA256 (PECL/memcached-2.2.0.tgz) = 17b9600f6d4c807f23a3f5c45fcd8775ca2e61d6eda70370af2bef4c6e159f58
+SIZE (PECL/memcached-2.2.0.tgz) = 70449

Modified: head/databases/pecl-memcached/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pecl-memcached/pkg-descr	Sat May 17 10:54:41 2014	(r354311)
+++ head/databases/pecl-memcached/pkg-descr	Sat May 17 10:55:09 2014	(r354312)
@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@ web applications by alleviating database
 This extension uses libmemcached library to provide API for
 communicating with memcached servers.
 
-WWW:	http://pecl.php.net/package/memcached
+WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/memcached
